failOn.description: Exit non-zero if the report has >=1 finding of this kind (e.g. import-cycle)

json.description: Emit the JSON HealthReport to stdout instead of the markdown

out.description: Override the report output directory or .md path (default: <workspace>/.llmem)

refresh.description: Refresh edge lists before scanning (use --no-refresh to skip)

severity.description: Minimum severity floor (reserved; forwarded to runHealthScan)

commands.description: Run the codebase health scan and write .llmem/health-report.{md,json}

commands.description: Print the machine-readable command schema (--json) or a human tree.

examples.scenario: Print the human-readable command tree
Emit the full JSON schema for agent integration

commands.name: describe

folder.description: Workspace-relative folder to scan (defaults to the whole workspace)

commands.description: Scan the workspace and write edge lists to .llmem/graph/

examples.scenario: Index the entire workspace
Index a single folder

commands.name: scan

_.description: (internal) Positional arguments routed by the dispatcher.

content.description: Inline JSON payload — the agent's report_file_info / report_folder_info body.

contentFile.description: Path to a file containing the JSON payload, or "-" to read stdin to EOF.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to a file or folder to document (positional accepted).

promptOnly.description: Print the LLM prompt to stdout and exit 0.

commands.description: Generate the LLM prompt or save an LLM-enriched design doc for a file or folder.

examples.scenario: Print the file documentation prompt
Print the folder documentation prompt
Pipe the agent's JSON output back to write .arch/src/parser/extractor.ts.md

commands.name: document

commands.description: Write the .llmem/config.toml stub (no-op if it already exists, --force overwrites).

examples.scenario: Create the config stub in the current workspace
Overwrite an existing stub

commands.name: init

_.description: (internal) Positional client names routed by the dispatcher.

dryRun.description: Print what would be written and exit 0 without touching any file.

force.description: Overwrite an existing llmem registration of the same name.

print.description: Print copy-pasteable config snippets (both forms) and exit 0; writes nothing.

scope.description: Config scope to target: user (cross-machine default), project, or local.

workspace.description: Workspace root to pin as LLMEM_WORKSPACE in the registration (auto-detected if omitted).

commands.description: Register the llmem MCP server with your agent client(s) (Claude Code, Codex, Claude Desktop).

examples.scenario: Auto-detect installed clients and register llmem
Print copy-pasteable config snippets (writes nothing)
